message: Update shift-enter mapping for Claude Code

files.patch:
@@ -23,5 +23,5 @@ adjust-cell-height = 15%
 keybind = global:shift+ctrl+option+cmd+t=toggle_quick_terminal
 quick-terminal-animation-duration = 0.25
 
-# Claude Code terminal integration.
-keybind = shift+enter=text:\n
+# Claude Code.
+keybind = shift+enter=text:\x1b\r
